ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the financial instrument */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument (e.g., software, banking) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-instrument mapping */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the financial instrument in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio-instrument mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio-instrument mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_instruments" (
  "watchlist_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist-instrument mapping */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist-instrument mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist-instrument mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_instruments_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "watchlist_instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist-instrument mapping that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_watchlist_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_instrument_id") REFERENCES watchlist_instruments ("watchlist_instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view_market_data, manage_portfolios) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
